case_title: JEAN L BATMAN VS. CHRIS COZZI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-18-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JEAN L. BATMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-30-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILL AMNED THE CLAIM TO REFLECT THE PROPER PLAINTIFF, HER CORPORATION AND RESERVE THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF JEAN L. BATMAN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHRIS COZZI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JON POLLAND; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
